MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANIEL HWANG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Defendant Daniel Hwang's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Dr. Hwang is required to prepare a proposed order which complies with CCP 437c(g) and states that the motion was not opposed.
